title: athyrium filix-femina var. molle
intro: Athyrium filix-femina var. molle, also known as Lady fern, is a variety of the common lady fern plant that belongs to the Osmundaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Athyrium filix-femina var. molle include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
